notes: No major issues or instability noted while using Proton 3.16-5 beta beyond some stuttering while entering a new area. Graphics render correctly, audio is fully functional and can be adjusted via options menu. Perfectly playable without tweaks so far, reporting as Gold for now since I've only played a little over an hour.
title: Mutant Year Zero: Road to Eden
